prompt: Le client Cascade SARL (nº org. 839016778) a une facture impayée de 45450 NOK hors TVA pour "Design web". Enregistrez le paiement intégral de cette facture.

Create an order for the customer Brightstone Ltd (org no. 971948981) with the products Data Advisory (4083) at 4050 NOK and Training Session (7105) at 12150 NOK. Convert the order to an invoice and register full payment.

Registre una nota de gastos de viaje para Pablo Rodríguez (pablo.rodriguez@example.org) por "Conferencia Ålesund". El viaje duró 5 días con dietas (tarifa diaria 800 NOK). Gastos: billete de avión 2750 NOK y taxi 700 NOK.

Create the product "Orange Juice" with product number 1043. The price is 40400 NOK excluding VAT, using the 15% food and beverage VAT rate.

Crie um pedido para o cliente Cascata Lda (org. nº 927161524) com os produtos Consultoria de dados (8400) a 5700 NOK e Design web (2535) a 3850 NOK. Converta o pedido em fatura e registe o pagamento total.

Kjør lønn for Erik Nilsen (erik.nilsen@example.org) for denne måneden. Grunnlønn er 53350 kr. Legg til en engangsbonus på 11050 kr i tillegg til grunnlønnen. Dersom lønns-API-et ikke fungerer, kan du bruke manuelle bilag på lønnskontoer (5000-serien) for å registrere lønnskostnaden.
Erstellen Sie drei Abteilungen in Tripletex: "Økonomi", "Logistikk" und "Produksjon".

Realice el cierre anual simplificado de 2025: 1) Calcule y contabilice la depreciación anual de tres activos: Kjøretøy (61850 NOK, 3 años lineales, cuenta 1230), IT-utstyr (64150 NOK, 9 años, cuenta 1210), Programvare (64950 NOK, 3 años, cuenta 1250). Use cuenta 6010 para gasto de depreciación y 1209 para depreciación acumulada. 2) Revierta gastos prepagados (total 25750 NOK en cuenta 1700). 3) Calcule y contabilice la provisión de impuestos (22 % del resultado imponible) en cuenta 8700/2920. Registre cada depreciación como un comprobante separado.
notes: Complex: Year-end closing with 3 depreciation vouchers, prepaid reversal, and tax provision. Requires multiple account lookups and voucher creation. Generic handler with recipe.

prompt: Enviámos uma fatura de 19074 EUR ao Oceano Lda (org. nº 966853204) quando a taxa de câmbio era 11.69 NOK/EUR. O cliente pagou agora, mas a taxa é 11.28 NOK/EUR. Registe o pagamento e lance a diferença cambial (disagio) na conta correta.
notes: Complex: Foreign currency invoice with exchange rate loss (disagio). Must create customer+invoice in EUR at old rate, register payment at new rate, book exchange difference. Accounts: 1500/3000 for receivable, 8160 for disagio.

prompt: Die Gesamtkosten sind von Januar bis Februar 2026 deutlich gestiegen. Analysieren Sie das Hauptbuch und identifizieren Sie die drei Aufwandskonten mit dem größten Anstieg. Erstellen Sie für jedes der drei Konten ein internes Projekt mit dem Kontonamen. Erstellen Sie außerdem eine Aktivität für jedes Projekt.
notes: Complex: Analytical task. Read ledger for Jan and Feb, compare expense accounts (4000-7999 range), find top 3 increases. Then create 3 internal projects (each named after an account) and 1 activity per project. Requires GET /ledger/account, comparing sums, POST /project x3, POST /activity x3.

prompt: Reconcilie o extrato bancario (CSV anexo) com as faturas em aberto no Tripletex. Relacione os pagamentos recebidos com as faturas de clientes e os pagamentos efetuados com as faturas de fornecedores. Trate os pagamentos parciais corretamente.
notes: Complex: Bank reconciliation from CSV attachment. Match incoming payments to customer invoices and outgoing payments to supplier invoices. Handle partial payments. Requires reading CSV, listing invoices, registering payments.

prompt: Run payroll for Emily Lewis (emily.lewis@example.org) for this month. The base salary is 53400 NOK. Add a one-time bonus of 16900 NOK on top of the base salary.
notes: Should parse as create_payroll (dedicated handler). Was misclassified as unknown in competition (29 calls, 11 errors). Dedicated handler does 5-7 calls with 0 errors.

prompt: We have received invoice INV-2026-3749 from the supplier Ridgepoint Ltd (org no. 902484981) for 65850 NOK including VAT. The amount relates to office services (account 6590). Register the supplier invoice with the correct input VAT (25%).
notes: Should parse as create_supplier + create_supplier_invoice. Was misclassified as unknown in competition (30 calls, 17 errors). Dedicated handler does 5 calls with 0 errors.

prompt: Opprett ein fri rekneskapsdimensjon "Prosjekttype" med verdiane "Utvikling" og "Internt". Bokfør deretter eit bilag på konto 7000 for 39700 kr, knytt til dimensjonsverdien "Internt".
notes: Should parse as create_dimension. Was misclassified as unknown in competition (12 calls, 5 errors). Dedicated handler does 5-8 calls with 0 errors.

prompt: O cliente Estrela Lda (org. nº 977023211) tem uma fatura pendente de 13650 NOK sem IVA por "Design web". Registe o pagamento total desta fatura.
notes: Should parse as ONLY create_payment (invoice already exists). Was misclassified as create_invoice + create_payment in competition (31 calls, 16 errors). Keyword: 'fatura pendente' means pending invoice.

prompt: Realize o encerramento mensal de março de 2026. Registe a reversão de acréscimos (11950 NOK por mês da conta 1710 para despesa). Registe a depreciação mensal de um ativo fixo com custo de aquisição 255000 NOK e vida útil 8 anos (depreciação linear para conta 6010). Verifique se o balancete está a zero. Registe também uma provisão salarial (débito conta de despesas salariais 5000, crédito conta de salários acumulados 2900).
notes: Complex: Monthly closing with accrual reversal, depreciation, and salary provision. From competition.

prompt: Execute o ciclo de vida completo do projeto 'Migração Cloud Floresta' (Floresta Lda, org. nº 909990343): 1) O projeto tem um orçamento de 407800 NOK. 2) Registe horas: Lucas Martins (gestor de projeto, lucas.martins@example.org) 28 horas e Bruno Costa (consultor, bruno.costa@example.org) 135 horas. 3) Registe custo de fornecedor de 70700 NOK de Luz do Sol Lda (org. nº 920920012). 4) Crie uma fatura ao cliente para o projeto.
notes: Complex: Full project lifecycle. 0/2 pass rate in DB — handler likely needs work. From competition.

prompt: Uno de sus clientes tiene una factura vencida. Encuentre la factura vencida y registre un cargo por recordatorio de 50 NOK. Debito cuentas por cobrar (1500), credito ingresos por recordatorio (3400). También cree una factura por la tarifa de recordatorio al cliente y envíela. Además, registre un pago parcial de 5000 NOK en la factura vencida.
notes: Complex: Find overdue invoice + add reminder fee voucher + create reminder invoice + partial payment. From competition.

prompt: Vi trenger Whiteboard fra denne kvitteringen bokført på avdeling Lager. Bruk riktig utgiftskonto basert på kjøpet, og sørg for korrekt MVA-behandling.
notes: Requires file attachment (receipt image). Will fail without file. From competition.

prompt: Sie haben ein Angebotsschreiben erhalten (siehe beigefügte PDF) für einen neuen Mitarbeiter. Führen Sie das vollständige Onboarding durch: erstellen Sie den Mitarbeiter, weisen Sie die richtige Abteilung zu, richten Sie die Beschäftigungsdetails mit Prozentsatz und Jahresgehalt ein, und konfigurieren Sie die Standardarbeitszeit.
notes: Requires PDF file attachment. Will fail without file. From competition.

prompt: We have discovered errors in the general ledger for January and February 2026. Review all vouchers and find the 4 errors: a posting on the wrong account, a duplicate voucher, a missing VAT line, and an incorrect amount. Correct all errors with corrective entries.
notes: Complex: find and correct 4 ledger errors. High API call budget.

prompt: Has recibido un contrato de trabajo (ver PDF adjunto). Crea el empleado en Tripletex con todos los datos del contrato: número de identidad, fecha de nacimiento, departamento, código de ocupación, salario, porcentaje de empleo y fecha de inicio.
notes: PDF-based: parse employment contract and create employee.

prompt: You received a supplier invoice (see attached PDF). Register the invoice in Tripletex. Create the supplier if it does not exist. Use the correct expense account and input VAT.
notes: PDF-based: parse supplier invoice and register.
